dcmtobids 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to dcmtobids

    Introduction to dcmtobids

    introduction.Rmd

    dcmtobids provides an R implementation of key DICOM-to-BIDS planning and conversion steps:

    • validate a config
    • build a conversion plan (dry-run)
    • execute conversion
    • produce a structured QA report

    This vignette uses precomputed helper-like files (.json, .nii.gz) so it can run without real DICOM data or dcm2niix.

    Setup 

    library(dcmtobids)
library(jsonlite)

td <- tempfile("dcmtobids-vig-")
dir.create(td)

input_dir <- file.path(td, "input")
bids_dir <- file.path(td, "bids")
config_path <- file.path(td, "config.json")

dir.create(input_dir)
dir.create(bids_dir)

    Create Minimal Example Inputs 

    writeLines('{"SeriesDescription":"T1_MPRAGE"}', file.path(input_dir, "001.json"))
writeLines("dummy", file.path(input_dir, "001.nii.gz"))

writeLines('{"SeriesDescription":"task-rest_bold"}', file.path(input_dir, "002.json"))
writeLines("dummy", file.path(input_dir, "002.nii.gz"))

    Write and Validate Config 

    cfg <- list(
  descriptions = list(
    list(
      datatype = "anat",
      suffix = "T1w",
      criteria = list(SeriesDescription = "*T1*")
    ),
    list(
      datatype = "func",
      suffix = "bold",
      custom_entities = list("task-rest"),
      criteria = list(SeriesDescription = "*rest*")
    )
  )
)

writeLines(toJSON(cfg, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE), config_path)

config <- read_config(config_path)
validate_config(config)

    Build Dry-Run Plan 

    plan <- plan_conversion(
  config = config,
  input_dir = input_dir,
  participant_label = "01"
)

plan[, c("source_json", "status", "destination_dir", "destination_stem")]
#>                                                                                             source_json
#> 1 /var/folders/9h/nkjq6vss7mqdl4ck7q1hd8ph0000gp/T/RtmpYmmoAN/dcmtobids-vig-b82724f1e4f9/input/001.json
#> 2 /var/folders/9h/nkjq6vss7mqdl4ck7q1hd8ph0000gp/T/RtmpYmmoAN/dcmtobids-vig-b82724f1e4f9/input/002.json
#>    status destination_dir      destination_stem
#> 1 MATCHED     sub-01/anat            sub-01_T1w
#> 2 MATCHED     sub-01/func sub-01_task-rest_bold

    Convert 

    conversion <- convert_plan(
  plan = plan,
  bids_dir = bids_dir,
  clobber = FALSE
)

conversion
#> $converted
#> [1] 4
#> 
#> $skipped
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> $errors
#> [1] 0
#> 
#> $warnings
#> list()

    Summarize QA Report 

    report <- summarize_plan(plan, conversion = conversion)
report$qa
#> $gate
#> [1] "pass"
#> 
#> $codes
#> list()

    Inspect Outputs 

    list.files(bids_dir, recursive = TRUE)
#> [1] "sub-01/anat/sub-01_T1w.json"             
#> [2] "sub-01/anat/sub-01_T1w.nii.gz"           
#> [3] "sub-01/func/sub-01_task-rest_bold.json"  
#> [4] "sub-01/func/sub-01_task-rest_bold.nii.gz"

    CLI Equivalent 

    # Create starter config
dcmtobids init-config --output ./config.json

# Preflight checks
dcmtobids doctor --skip-dcm2niix --config ./config.json --bids-dir ./bids

# Run conversion from helper-style files
dcmtobids run \
  --skip-dcm2niix \
  --dicom-dir ./input \
  --config ./config.json \
  --bids-dir ./bids \
  --participant 01 \
  --report ./report.json

    Developed by Core Maintainer.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
